protein_name: Involved in the development of the olfactory system and in neuronal control of puberty. Induces the collapse and paralysis of neuronal growth cones. Could serve as a ligand that guides specific growth cones by a motility-inhibiting mechanism. Binds to the complex neuropilin-1/plexin-1. Belongs to the semaphorin family. Expressed in the dorsal root ganglia. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
